user_task: Generate a GROMACS post-processing workflow to count molecules crossing a z-threshold.
required_input_files: trajectory file such as .xtc when required
run input file such as .tpr when required
energy file such as .edr when required
index file such as .ndx when custom selections are required

workflow.topology_check: Verify that topol.top exists and that the [ molecules ] section matches the coordinate file.
workflow.command_sequence: gmx select -s md.tpr -f md.xtc -select 'resname SOL and z > 8.0' -os evaporation_count.xvg

validation_note: Check successful command execution and physical meaning of output. Short trajectories are workflow-validation tests unless production-scale sampling is used.
